contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: Responding to FounderHaus
  
  I spoken to Liz and Shena separately about financing the flight and accommodation for the Florianopolis leg of my tour duty this year
  
  Seems their response were the same. They are open to being collaborative about it but wants to know 
  
  What specific performance metrics are we seeking to advance for FounderHaus and the Agroverse with my presence during the August period 
  
  Seems they are seeing it in terms of driving sales, channel distribution throughput or investment proceeds into the DAO with my presence there 
  
  When I think about it critically unless the Prospera entity has been setup, there is probably not much of a direct on-ramp for fiat investments into the DAO 
  
  Not sure what the demographic distribution is for the folks attending the August month to get a sense regarding onboarding retailers or distributors or tech companies who will white label the cacao for the corporate gifts 
  
  You have more visibility into that aspects of the funnel 
  
  Let me know the performance metric we can commit to with this proposed DAO resource deployment for the month of August and then I will surface it to them as well as potentially other DAO members privately for financing discussions 😊🙏
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 16.67
- Attached Filename: IMG_2135.png
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/contribution_20260602154350_gary_teh_img_2135.png
